title: The dispatch prompt file: close the gap that would have made slice 1 loop forever doing nothing
action: control-loop.sh resolves its prompt at ../references/<role>-prompt.md and bootstrap-cockpit.sh starts the dispatch loop, but no cell in slice 1 created that file - so starting the cockpit today would report 'prompt file not found' every 60 seconds and, per D19, continue forever accomplishing nothing. Write the missing dispatch prompt: the text handed to a cold `claude -p` each cycle. It must (a) tell the agent to load and follow the herdr-orchestrating skill's dispatch role, (b) state that it has no memory of any previous cycle and must read every fact live, (c) state that it is running unattended so it reports rather than asks, and (d) be short - the skill carries the detail, the prompt only routes to it. Write byte-identical copies into both skill roots.

truths: Starting the loop with --role dispatch resolves and passes the prompt file instead of erroring
The prompt names the herdr-orchestrating skill's dispatch role as what to follow
The prompt states the agent has no memory of previous cycles

artifacts.substantive: the per-cycle prompt that routes a cold agent into the dispatch role

prohibitions: Do not restate the dispatch procedure here; the skill owns it and two copies would drift
Do not modify control-loop.sh or SKILL.md in this cell

verify: set -e; P=.claude/skills/herdr-orchestrating/references/dispatch-prompt.md; test -s "$P"; grep -qi 'herdr-orchestrating' "$P"; grep -qiE 'no memory|remember nothing|cold' "$P"; diff -q "$P" .agents/skills/herdr-orchestrating/references/dispatch-prompt.md; mkdir -p .bee/tmp/stubbin; printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nprintf "STUB_CLAUDE_SAW %%s bytes\\n" "${#2}"\n' > .bee/tmp/stubbin/claude; chmod +x .bee/tmp/stubbin/claude; OUT=$(PATH="$PWD/.bee/tmp/stubbin:$PATH" bash .claude/skills/herdr-orchestrating/scripts/control-loop.sh --role dispatch --max-iterations 1 --interval 1 2>&1); echo "$OUT" | grep -q 'STUB_CLAUDE_SAW'; ! echo "$OUT" | grep -qi 'prompt file not found'; rm -rf .bee/tmp/stubbin; echo PROMPT_WIRED

trace.outcome: The dispatch prompt file that slice 1's loop resolves and its bootstrap starts - missing until now, which would have made the cockpit run forever accomplishing nothing.
trace.verify_command: set -e; P=.claude/skills/herdr-orchestrating/references/dispatch-prompt.md; test -s "$P"; grep -qi 'herdr-orchestrating' "$P"; grep -qiE 'no memory|remember nothing|cold' "$P"; diff -q "$P" .agents/skills/herdr-orchestrating/references/dispatch-prompt.md; mkdir -p .bee/tmp/stubbin; printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nprintf "STUB_CLAUDE_SAW %%s bytes\\n" "${#2}"\n' > .bee/tmp/stubbin/claude; chmod +x .bee/tmp/stubbin/claude; OUT=$(PATH="$PWD/.bee/tmp/stubbin:$PATH" bash .claude/skills/herdr-orchestrating/scripts/control-loop.sh --role dispatch --max-iterations 1 --interval 1 2>&1); echo "$OUT" | grep -q 'STUB_CLAUDE_SAW'; ! echo "$OUT" | grep -qi 'prompt file not found'; rm -rf .bee/tmp/stubbin; echo PROMPT_WIRED
